name: Aubergine-Kartoffel-Haehnchen-Ofenpfanne
recipeIngredient: 1 yellow bell pepper; seeded and cut into strips
1 green bell pepper; seeded and cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 180°C.
2. Season the chicken thighs with sweet paprika powder, salt, and pepper.
3. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Add the seasoned chicken thighs to the skillet and cook until browned on both sides, about 6-8 minutes per side.
5. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
6. In the same skillet, add diced potatoes, chopped tomatoes, yellow bell pepper strips, green bell pepper strips, and onions.
7. Cook for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are tender.
8. Return the cooked chicken to the skillet and stir everything together.
9. Add butter and cook for an additional minute until heated through.
10. Serve hot and enjoy!
